hypotheses.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
hypotheses.label: primary
likely_caveats: Proxy selection may dominate the result.
Macro releases require explicit publication-lag handling.
hypotheses.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
hypotheses.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
hypotheses.thesis: Investigate whether need a merge plan. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
hypotheses.title: Primary macro transmission

hypotheses.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
hypotheses.label: counterfactual
likely_caveats: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
hypotheses.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
hypotheses.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
hypotheses.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
hypotheses.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

hypotheses.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
hypotheses.label: regime
likely_caveats: Regime definitions may be unstable or ex post.
Smaller sample sizes can weaken inference.
hypotheses.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
hypotheses.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
hypotheses.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
hypotheses.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
